ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country (e.g., AUS for Australia) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the GDP data belongs to */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP value in billion USD */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the GDP data was collected */,
  "nominal_gdp" REAL /* Nominal GDP value in billion USD */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "air_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the air quality data belongs to */,
  "pm2_5" REAL /* PM2.5 value in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the air quality data was collected */,
  "pm10" REAL /* PM10 value in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "no2" REAL /* NO2 value in parts per billion */,
  "o3" REAL /* O3 value in parts per billion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("air_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., economic, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ratings_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_categories_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)
